scripts.dev: pnpm --filter @veh/shared build && concurrently -n server,web -c blue,green "pnpm --filter @veh/server dev" "pnpm --filter @veh/web dev"
scripts.build: pnpm --filter @veh/shared build && pnpm --filter @veh/server build && pnpm --filter @veh/web build
scripts.tauri:prepare: pnpm --filter @veh/shared build && pnpm --filter @veh/web build && pnpm --filter @veh/server binary && node scripts/fetch-whisper-cli.mjs
